As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Rates Soften but Remain at Historically High Levels - The dirty tanker market continues to trade at substantially higher year-over-year levels, with the Baltic Dirty Tanker Index currently around 90% above the same period last year.
